description: A moist cake made with grated carrots and warm spices, often layered or topped with cream cheese frosting. Many versions also include nuts, raisins, pineapple, or coconut.
preparation_steps: Mix the batter using grated carrots, dry ingredients, and wet ingredients.
Fold in optional nuts or fruit if using.
Bake until the cake is set and a skewer comes out clean.
Cool fully and frost, commonly with cream cheese frosting.

health_advice.benefits: Contains carrots and sometimes nuts, but it is still mainly a dessert.
health_advice.risks: Often high in sugar and calories, especially with frosting.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Treat it as a dessert rather than a health food, and keep portions moderate.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional recipes contain eggs, dairy, and wheat. Vegan and gluten-free versions are possible with substitutions.

allergens: Gluten unless gluten-free flour is used
